prestazioni: Replace the original Tadek Marek 3.7L inline-6 (engine code: DB4/370) with a fully forged 4.2L stroker version using a billet crankshaft from Cosworth (4.2L displacement, 94mm stroke, 92mm bore) paired with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.5:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods. The cylinder head is ported and flowed by RS Performance with oversized Ferrea intake (1.94") and exhaust (1.60") valves, titanium retainers, and a custom camshaft profile (280° duration, 0.500" lift) from Kent Cams.

Install a custom-built dry-sump oiling system from Aviaid with a 10-quart reservoir, dual Gerotor pumps, and a Setrab oil cooler (19-row, 19x11x2.5") to prevent oil starvation during high-G cornering. Pair this with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Hayward & Scott, featuring 304-grade mandrel-bent tubing, dual 2.5" outlets, and a pair of Borla Pro XS mufflers (part #40849) for a deep, non-resonant tone.

Upgrade the original 4-speed David Brown gearbox to a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed (close-ratio: 2.87, 1.89, 1.28, 1.00, 0.82) with a Quaife ATB differential (40% lockup) and a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (7.25" diameter, 1,200 lb-ft capacity). The drivetrain is reinforced with a custom aluminum driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" diameter, 1350-series U-joints) and a limited-slip differential from Wavetrac (DB4-specific housing).
estetica: Replace the original steel body panels with a full carbon fiber replica body kit from RML Group (DB4 GT Continuation-spec), including a lightweight hood (12 lbs savings), front fenders, and trunk lid. The kit includes functional heat extractors on the hood and a rear diffuser from Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) for improved aerodynamics.

Install a set of 16"x6" (front) and 16"x7" (rear) OZ Racing Ultraleggera wheels (ET20 offset, 5x120 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (205/55/16 front, 225/50/16 rear). The suspension is upgraded with a full Ohlins DFV coilover kit (DB4-specific valving, 2-way adjustable dampers) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114) for improved chassis rigidity.

Interior modifications include a full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a 360mm MOMO Prototipo wheel (suede-wrapped, 6-point quick-release hub), Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, FIA-approved), and a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (8-point, TIG-welded, chrome-moly steel). The dashboard is refitted with a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" OLED display) and a custom switch panel from Carling Technologies (illuminated toggles for auxiliary systems).
